name: Grilled Tuna with Citrus Shallot Vinaigrette
recipeIngredient: Yellowfin tuna steaks, 6-9 oz each, and at least 1 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the outside peel of the lemon and lime using a swiveled-edge vegetable peeler.
2. Julienne the peel.
3. Bring a cup of water to a boil and drop the julienne peel in for 30 seconds.
4. Drain into a strainer and rinse with cold water.
5. Squeeze the juice from the lemon and lime.
6. Combine the juice, zest, vinegar, sliced shallots, sugar, oil, and crushed red pepper to create the vinaigrette.
7. Coat the tuna steaks lightly with oil or spray with non-stick spray.
8. Grill for 2-3 minutes per side, basting with a little of the liquid from the vinaigrette.
9. Remove to plates and top with remaining vinaigrette.
10. Serves 2
